testcases.input: words = ["a","b","ba","bca","bda","bdca"] Output: 4 Explanation: One of the longest word chains is ["a","ba","bda","bdca"].
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: One of the longest word chains is ["a","ba","bda","bdca"].

testcases.input: words = ["xbc","pcxbcf","xb","cxbc","pcxbc"] Output: 5 Explanation: All the words can be put in a word chain ["xb", "xbc", "cxbc", "pcxbc", "pcxbcf"].
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: All the words can be put in a word chain ["xb", "xbc", "cxbc", "pcxbc", "pcxbcf"].

testcases.input: words = ["abcd","dbqca"] Output: 1 Explanation: The trivial word chain ["abcd"] is one of the longest word chains. ["abcd","dbqca"] is not a valid word chain because the ordering of the letters is changed.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The trivial word chain ["abcd"] is one of the longest word chains. ["abcd","dbqca"] is not a valid word chain because the ordering of the letters is changed.
